text.title: RPO/RTO Negotiation Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure: quantify impact → present cost-curve → tier-banded options → signed acceptance → annual refresh.

step.name: quantify-impact
step.input: Revenue analytics + SLA penalty schedule + historical outage hours/year
step.action: Run `quantify-impact`. Compute $ / hr of downtime, annual exposure. Prepare narrative leading with impact, not cost.
step.decision-gate: If impact cannot be quantified, defer negotiation; do NOT run with vibes.

step.name: present-cost-curve
step.action: In the meeting, present impact FIRST (per r2). Then introduce cost-curve. Do NOT lead with cost.

step.name: present-tier-banded-options
step.input: ≥3 tier-banded options each with RPO/RTO + cost delta + operational impact
step.action: Run `present-tier-bands`. Walk through tier-0 (current), tier-1, tier-2, optionally tier-3.

step.name: capture-signed-acceptance
step.input: Stakeholder's verbal choice + meeting recording / signed memo
step.action: Run `capture-acceptance`. Transcribe stakeholder's own words into `chosen.stakeholder_echo`. Attach evidence_link (transcript URL or signed doc id).
step.decision-gate: If stakeholder does not echo the chosen numbers, the record is NOT signed; reschedule.

step.name: annual-refresh
step.action: Re-run steps 1-4. Increment version. Update decided_at + refresh_due. Old record archived but not deleted.
